'''zhothazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hobbitlike|hobbitlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hobbitlike|hobbitlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhothazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhothazithi|zhothazithi]] || [[word:zhothaziji|zhothaziji]] || [[word:zhothazishi|zhothazishi]] || [[word:zhothaziki|zhothaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhothazuthuthu|zhothazuthuthu]] || [[word:zhothazujuju|zhothazujuju]] || [[word:zhothazushushu|zhothazushushu]] || [[word:zhothazukuku|zhothazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhothazuthu|zhothazuthu]] || [[word:zhothazuju|zhothazuju]] || [[word:zhothazushu|zhothazushu]] || [[word:zhothazuku|zhothazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhothazufthuf|zhothazufthuf]] || [[word:zhothazufjuf|zhothazufjuf]] || [[word:zhothazufshuf|zhothazufshuf]] || [[word:zhothazufkuf|zhothazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhothazethe|zhothazethe]] || [[word:zhothazeje|zhothazeje]] || [[word:zhothazeshe|zhothazeshe]] || [[word:zhothazeke|zhothazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhothazothotho|zhothazothotho]] || [[word:zhothazojojo|zhothazojojo]] || [[word:zhothazoshosho|zhothazoshosho]] || [[word:zhothazokoko|zhothazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhothazotho|zhothazotho]] || [[word:zhothazojo|zhothazojo]] || [[word:zhothazosho|zhothazosho]] || [[word:zhothazoko|zhothazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhothazofthof|zhothazofthof]] || [[word:zhothazofjof|zhothazofjof]] || [[word:zhothazofshof|zhothazofshof]] || [[word:zhothazofkof|zhothazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfthĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfjĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfshĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfkĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfthĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfjĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfshĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfkĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfthĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfjĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfshĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhothazĂŻfkĂŻf|zhothazĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhothazĂŠthĂŠ|zhothazĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhothazĂŠjĂŠ|zhothazĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhothazĂŠshĂŠ|zhothazĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhothazĂŠkĂŠ|zhothazĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhothazathatha|zhothazathatha]] || [[word:zhothazajaja|zhothazajaja]] || [[word:zhothazashasha|zhothazashasha]] || [[word:zhothazakaka|zhothazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhothazatha|zhothazatha]] || [[word:zhothazaja|zhothazaja]] || [[word:zhothazasha|zhothazasha]] || [[word:zhothazaka|zhothazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhothazafthaf|zhothazafthaf]] || [[word:zhothazafjaf|zhothazafjaf]] || [[word:zhothazafshaf|zhothazafshaf]] || [[word:zhothazafkaf|zhothazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhothazasha|zhothazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhothazshĂ«sha|zhothazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhothazrosha|zhothazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhothazmusha|zhothazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhothazyasha|zhothazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhothaznkshĂ«sha|gozhothaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhothaznkrosha|gozhothaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhothaznkmusha|gozhothaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhothaznkyasha|gozhothaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhothathazasha|zhothathazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhothathazshĂ«sha|zhothathazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhothathazrosha|zhothathazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhothathazmusha|zhothathazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhothathazyasha|zhothathazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhothathaznkshĂ«sha|gozhothathaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhothathaznkrosha|gozhothathaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhothathaznkmusha|gozhothathaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhothathaznkyasha|gozhothathaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhethĂŠzasha|zhethĂŠzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhethĂŠzshĂ«sha|zhethĂŠzshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhethĂŠzrosha|zhethĂŠzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhethĂŠzmusha|zhethĂŠzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhethĂŠzyasha|zhethĂŠzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhethĂŠznkshĂ«sha|gozhethĂŠznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhethĂŠznkrosha|gozhethĂŠznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhethĂŠznkmusha|gozhethĂŠznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhethĂŠznkyasha|gozhethĂŠznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhothfazasha|zhothfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhothfazshĂ«sha|zhothfazshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhothfazrosha|zhothfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhothfazmusha|zhothfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhothfazyasha|zhothfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhothfaznkshĂ«sha|gozhothfaznkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhothfaznkrosha|gozhothfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhothfaznkmusha|gozhothfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhothfaznkyasha|gozhothfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
